$comment: Source of truth for the Copperline Eatery menu. Edit this file then run scripts/build-menu.py to regenerate menu.html sections + JSON-LD. Prices in USD. dietaryFlags: 'v' = vegetarian, 'gf' = gluten-free. 'popular' marks signature dishes.

items.name: 1 Egg and Toast
items.description: One egg cooked your way with toast

items.name: 2 Eggs and Toast
items.description: Two eggs cooked your way with toast

items.description: Two eggs cooked your way with toast, homefries, and your choice of kielbasa or ham

items.name: Eggs Benedict
items.description: Two poached eggs on English muffin halves with Canadian bacon, topped with our award-winning house-made hollandaise sauce, served with homefries

sections.name: French Toast & Pancakes
sections.note: Real maple syrup add $0.75. Substitute French toast add $0.75

sections.note: Served with homefries and toast. Substitute shredded potatoes add $2.25. Choose ingredients: mushrooms, peppers, onions, tomatoes, bacon, sausage, ham, kielbasa, cheese.
